ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Aug-03-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-18-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Eric Shiu, Esq. for Plaintiff Salesforce.com inc.
Plaintiff's Witness Betty Levitin was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Senior Care Advocates, Inc. as follows:
Damages $42,120.00
Prejudgment Interest $2,970.33
Attorney Fees $1,000.00
Costs $590.00, for a total of $46,680.33
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2009 Continued To Jul-31-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
